title: Nexum Trust Manifest
description: Machine-readable risk profile for an API consumed by an AI agent. Generated by the Nexum Scanner from an MCP or OpenAPI spec. Fields marked REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW must be completed manually before the manifest is considered final.

manifest_version.description: Version of the Trust Manifest schema used to generate this document.

scanned_at.description: UTC timestamp of when the scanner produced this manifest.

source_file.description: Filename of the MCP or OpenAPI spec that was scanned.

inferred_risk_tier.description: Risk tier derived from nexum_risk_score. 0 = Low (0–30), 1 = Moderate (31–60), 2 = High (61–100).

nexum_risk_score.description: Aggregate risk score. CRITICAL findings add 25 pts, HIGH 10, MEDIUM 5, LOW 1. Capped at 100.

model_compatibility_range.description: Which model capability levels are safe for this integration. Set to REQUIRES_HUMAN_REVIEW in all scanner-generated drafts. Must be filled in manually before the manifest is considered final.

auto_detected_invariants.description: Constraints inferred statically from the spec. These are best-effort — absence does not mean no constraints exist.

immutable_fields.description: Field names marked readOnly:true in component schemas. Agents must not attempt to write to these fields.

numeric_limits.description: Numeric and length constraints extracted from component schemas, keyed as 'SchemaName.fieldName'. Agents must operate within these bounds.

required_headers.description: HTTP headers that are required on one or more operations (e.g. Idempotency-Key). Orchestration layers should enforce these at the gateway level.

findings_summary.description: One entry per finding produced by the scanner, sorted by severity (CRITICAL first).

rule_id.description: Identifier of the rule that fired.

path.description: API path where the finding was detected.

manual_review_required.description: Fields the scanner could not fill automatically. Each entry identifies a field and explains why human judgment is needed.

field.description: Dot-path to the field that requires review (e.g. 'model_compatibility_range').

reason.description: Why this field cannot be inferred from the spec.
